text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I happen to see Nishino Flower on the way back
to her dorm.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I've completed my class duties for the day, and I
turned in that one handout too.

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
I don't have any homework, so I think I'll relax in
my room and tend to my flowers...

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
Aaaah! I forgot to water the flower beds on
campus!

text_block_list.name: Nishino Flower
text_block_list.text:
How could I be so careless?! Everyone, please
forgive me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The exhaustion from running so many consecutive
races may be catching up with Nishino Flower. It
would be best to rethink her schedule.
